name: Raza Brava
overview: Two childhood friends, born in the outskirts of Santiago during Pinochet’s dictatorship, grow up under the banner of Colo-Colo, the country’s most popular club. United by passion, ambition, and loyalty, they rise to lead Chile’s most feared fan base, La Garra Blanca—until envy and betrayal turn them against each other in a deadly feud.
